<!-- Generated by the engine-decomposition analysis (9-agent workflow, opus-4-8).
     The authoritative build plan for the v2 React/Next rebuild. -->

# Portfolio → React/Next (App Router) Decomposition Spec

A single vanilla-JS IIFE (`main.js`, ~3850 lines) becomes a componentized Next App-Router site. The non-negotiable contract: **byte-identical DOM ids/classes**, **verbatim physics/seed math**, and the two motion laws intact — *strike = ink* (impression line) and *setting = matter* (seeded-asymmetric setdown). Everything below assumes headless Playwright verification per phase, never feel-judgement in the embedded pane.

The whole app is one long scrolling page (`/`), plus a same-origin loader route (`/loader`) and hash-routed project modals (`#p-0N`). There is no multi-page routing to design around — the "architecture" is almost entirely **one shared engine + imperative hooks against refs**, wrapped in a thin declarative JSX shell.

---

## 1. Shared engine

The IIFE's module scope is the real "engine." In React it splits three ways: **pure util modules** (import-safe on server), **one client `EngineProvider`** (the mutable shared state + the master loops + the observers), and **per-section local refs** (never lifted). The dominant rule from every area analysis: *the hot paths write `el.style`/`setAttribute` against refs and trigger zero React renders* — so most "state" is `useRef`, and React state is reserved for the handful of values that actually change what renders.

### 1a. Pure util modules (no hooks, no `'use client'`, server-safe)

| Module | Exports (source lines) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `lib/rng.ts` | `mulberry32` (5), `stonePath` (14), `SVG_NS` (36) | Verbatim. LEAF utilities consumed by trail, cairn, indicator, thread, thumbnails, SETTING. Do not touch the wobble math (`N=9`, `0.82+rnd()*0.3`, round to 0.1). |
| `lib/math.ts` | `clamp` (989), `r2` (988), `lerp` (990) | Currently declared *inside* the cursor loop but consumed by `threadStep`, hold-register, cairn, softPull. Hoist to a standalone module. |
| `lib/plates.ts` | `PROJECTS` (48), `ACCENTS` (64), `PLATE_INK/PAPER/RED` (72), `motifSVG` (74), `plateURI` (110), `plateAccent` (71), `detailURI` (3658), `CASE` (3586) | All pure string builders (`encodeURIComponent` on static SVG). `detailURI`/`CASE` live at 3581-3672 in source but belong here so every plate builder sits together. Note `detailURI` hardcodes `#DDDBD4` for the caption (not `PLATE_PAPER`) — keep. |
| `lib/desk.ts` | `DESK_TZ` (426), `deskTime` (427), `deskHour` (452), `deskStatus` (458) | Take a `Date` argument (testability + SSR determinism). Intl in `America/Los_Angeles` is deterministic; `new Date()` is not — the *component* handles that. |
| `lib/paths.ts` | `handLoopD` (mess amp loop, seeds 11/23), `softPull` (3533, `clamp(sign(v)*pow(|v|,0.72)*2.2,-110,110)`), `stoneAge` (3389) | Pure geometry/format helpers pulled out of their subsystems. |

### 1b. `EngineProvider` — the one client provider

A single `'use client'` provider mounted in the root layout, holding everything that is *genuinely global* (read/written by more than one section) plus the master loops. Internally it is mostly refs; it exposes a small typed context.

**Truly-global React state** (drives what renders, so it must be state, not ref):
- `accentI` + `setAccent` — persisted `ma-accent-i`; drives `plates = useMemo(() => PROJECTS.map(p => plateURI(p, ACCENTS[accentI].night)), [accentI])`. **This memo replaces both the boot build (147) and `rebuildPlates()` entirely** — every plate surface reads `plates[i]` from context and re-inks reactively. Biggest single win of the port.
- `isNight` + `setNight(on, persist)` — persisted `ma-night`; a `next-themes`-shaped problem. Drives `body.night` (or `data-theme`) and, via effect, `document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent', ACCENTS[i][isNight?'night':'day'])`. `applyAccent()` disappears — model `--accent` as an effect on `[accentI, isNight]`.
- `proofOn` + `setProof` — the mess/persona master flag (`body.proof`). The single most cross-cutting piece of true state (rows, notes, desk, outro, ticker, cursor, cat, fresh-ink all read it). Its side-effect cascade lives in **one** `useEffect([proofOn])` in the provider.
- `noiseOn` + `setNoise` — WebAudio opt-in (drives the `[S]` button label/aria). **Never persisted** (per-visit choice).
- `hasCursor` — `trailEnabled() && !reduced()`, drives `body.has-cursor`.
- `heroLanded`, `isLateDesk`, clock string — small display state.
- `logEntries` — job-log array (hydrated from `ma-presslog-v1`).

**Ref-backed global values** (read by imperative loops; must not trigger renders):
- `mouseRef` `{x,y}` (981) — the single pointer feed. One `document` `mousemove` listener at root mutates it. *Drag hooks (loupe, loose-type, plate-pull) also write it from their own `pointermove`* — the **compat-mousemove gotcha** appears at ≥4 sites and must survive verbatim (a `preventDefault`'d `pointerdown` freezes compat mouse events, so the dot freezes unless drags feed `mouseRef`).
- `scrollRef` + published `prog` — one passive `scroll` listener → the scroll-rAF (below).
- Mode flags as **both** reactive state *and* ref getters: `isReducedRef.current`, `stillModeRef.current`, `proofOnRef.current`. Physics loops read the refs synchronously without subscribing; components read the state.
- `seedRef` — a single per-load `mulberry32(Date.now() & 0xfffff)` for the SETTING/cairn, created once via lazy `useRef` (StrictMode double-invoke must reuse it or geometry changes between passes).
- `mrRanRef` — did the loader run this load (decides hero-set vs loader-owned entrance).
- Loupe singletons: `loupeOnRef`, `loupedPlatesRef`, `lastLoupeTf/Bs/Bp`, `curPlateRef`, `openRef` — declared in the loupe subsystem (3471-3476) but consumed by `frame()` and the line lifecycle via var-hoisting, so they are **engine refs, not component-owned**.
- `pullStateRef` — plate-pull drag state, read by `regHeroBusy`.
- `audioCtxRef` + `noiseOnRef` mirror — lazy `AudioContext` created inside the enable handler only (autoplay policy: `resume()` on enable).

**The imperative-handle registry** (mirrors the IIFE's hoisting / late-binding, solving mount-order independence):
```
engine.api.current = {
  logAct, strikeAll, regHardZero, regKick, positionAnchors,
  buildLine, buildTerrain, buildThread, measureStrikes, checkStrikes,
  updateThread, disarmSetting, kickSheet, catLife, cacheInkNotes,
  clearWet, sndClack, sndTok, sndSlam, closeProject, resetLooseType
}
```
Each subsystem registers its handle in a mount effect; callers (the `proofOn` cascade, the keydown handler, the SETTING) invoke through the registry. This is the direct React translation of `logAct`/`disarmSetting` being forward/late-bound in one IIFE.

### 1c. The master loops & observers (owned by the provider)

There is **not literally one rAF** in the source — be honest about this. Consolidate the *scroll* work; keep the always-on *cursor* loop; keep ephemeral physics loops component-local but ref-guarded.

| Loop / observer | Source | React home | What it does |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Scroll engine** | `onScroll` 1888-1912 | Provider effect: one passive `scroll` listener, `scrollQueued` rAF throttle. Computes `prog` once, publishes it, fans out. | Drives `checkStrikes()`, `regFrame()`, `updateThread()` (proof only), cairn indicator `.on` toggles, `#scroll-pct`. **Do not give any subsystem its own scroll listener.** |
| **Cursor/reveal/loupe frame** | `frame()` 975-1076 | Provider effect: one always-on rAF, id in ref, cancel in cleanup. | Cursor 1:1, reveal lerp+skew/rotate, loupe cover-fit pan. Reads `mouseRef`, `loupeOnRef`, `lineLoupeItem.face`. Zero state per frame. |
| **SETTING IntersectionObserver** | `initSetting` 2713-2960 | `useSetting()` in provider (or a `<TheSetting>` mounted at root). `rootMargin '0px 0px -12% 0px'`, unobserve-on-entry. | Arms `set-in`/`set-fade`, triggers `trailChoreo`/`yardChoreo`/`kickSheet`. Seeded per load — **client-only, seed-once**. |
| **Mess/notes IntersectionObserver** | `watchNotes` 1498+ | Created in the `[proofOn]` effect on mess-enter, torn down on exit (so draw-ins replay). | Adds `.seen` to `.note/.anchor/.chip-ring/.amark`. |
| **Line physics rAF** | `lineFrame` 729-794 | **Lives in `<WorkIndex>`**, gated by an `IntersectionObserver(indexRef)` + `document.hidden`. Not a root loop. | Idle sway / dying draft / drag-lag / overdamped drift. |
| **FPS meter** | `fpsLoop` | Dev-only `<FpsMeter>` behind `?fps`, own rAF. | — |

Ephemeral rAFs (**stay component-local**, each ref-guarded, each cancelled in cleanup): `threadStep` (thread reveal, single-flight, proof only), `physicsFrame` (loose type, while active), `inkFrame` (one-shot per mousemove), `topple` (cairn fall, 700ms), `rollOdo` (odometer).

### 1d. Global vs per-section — the line

**Global (EngineProvider):** accent/plates, night/theme, proof/mess, noise/audio, media flags, `mouseRef`, scroll engine + `prog`, cursor/reveal/loupe frame + the singleton DOM (`#cursor`, `.reveal>#reveal-scaler>#reveal-plate`, `#loupe`, `#thread`, `.regmark`), the SETTING, `stillMode`/`mrRan`/seed, `logAct`/joblog, the imperative registry, and the boot reads (URL params, hash landing, global keydown).

**Per-section (local refs, exposed only via registry when cross-cut):** thread geometry (`ThoughtThread`), line physics items `lineItems` (`WorkIndex`), loose-type/ink glyph physics on `chars[]` (`Hero`), cairn `stackStones`/`groundStones`/`stoneSeq` (`VisitorsCairn`), odometer count (`VisitOdometer`), OK-slip verdict (`OkSlip`), strike store (`useImpressionLine`), hold-register scalar (`useHoldRegister`). None of these belong in the provider; they mutate at frame rate or are section-owned persistence.

---

## 2. Component tree

Root layout is a **Server Component** (ships settled/printed HTML: no `.unstruck`, no `set-*` arming, `#amp .ch` at `opacity:1`). `EngineProvider` and everything with hooks is `'use client'`. Because SSR ships the *reduced/still fallback* (fully visible, printed), there is no hydration mismatch — the client effects add motion after mount.

```
app/layout.tsx                         [server]  <html><body> shell, fonts, blocking theme script
app/page.tsx                           [server]  composes the section JSX (static markup)
  <EngineProvider>                     [client]  §1 — context, master loops, boot reads, keydown
    ── shared chrome (app root) ──
    <Grain/>                           [server]  .grain overlay (pure CSS/SVG)
    <Frame/> <Corners/>                [server]  registration corners / frame furniture
    <Ticker/>                          [client]  .ticker > #ticker-track — declarative double-render (2nd aria-hidden); deskStatus spliced from clock ctx; pause className from proof/unstruck
    <Cursor/>                          [client]  #cursor > .cursor-label  (singleton, owns cursorRef)
    <Reveal/>                          [client]  .reveal > #reveal-scaler > #reveal-plate (singleton)
    <Loupe/>                           [client]  #loupe (singleton; positioned by the engine frame)
    <ThoughtThread/>                   [client]  #thread SVG: th-a/th-a-echo/th-b/th-b-echo/th-spur/th-scratch/th-arrow/th-tip
    <RegMark/>                         [client]  .regmark (singleton — fidget + regTick + hold-register all write it)
    <ImpressionLine/>                  [client]  #impline hairline (top:62vh)
    <CairnIndicator/>                  [client]  #cairn-ind (#cairn-svg 5 stones) + #scroll-pct
    <StoneTip/>                        [client]  #stone-tip (delegated hover on #pile)
    <IdleLine/>                        [client]  #idle-line
    <MakeReadyLoader/>                 [client]  #makeready > #mr-frame (see §4; mounts once, first visit only)
    <ProjectViewer/>                   [client]  #pv portal (z60), hash-routed #p-0N
    <FpsMeter/>                        [client]  dev-only, ?fps
    ── page flow ──
    <Hero/>                            [client]  #hero, #hero-title.hero-title.v3 > #amp(&) + .v3-words>#markw + #deskw; #hero-bio; .eyebrow; .hl-mask lockup; mess anchors #anchor-amp/#anchor-bio/#amark-desk/#amark-write; #type-decal #plates-decal #loose-decal
    <Trail/>                           [mostly server markup + client effect]  .trail>.trail-frame, #terrain, #terrain-ground, .terrain-stones>6×.stone-slot>svg.mile-stone, .terrain-labels, .mile-label
    <WorkIndex/>                       [client]  .index/#index: .index-head/.index-sub, svg.line-wire (#line-wire), #line-wll, #line-dock, 4×<WorkRow>, .cat, .proof-notes
      <WorkRow/> ×4                    [client]  .row[data-plate]>.row-thumb + .row-title/.row-meta/.row-ref/.row-desc
    <Desk/>                            [client]  .desk: .desk-head, .desk-rows>.desk-row, #clock, #job-date, #stamp-date
      <PaintChips/>                    [client]  .chips>.chip ×3 (aria-pressed={i===accentI})
      <NightToggle/>                   [client]  #night-btn
      <NoiseToggle/>                   [client]  #noise-btn
      <ProofToggleButton/>            [client]  #proof-btn (SEE THE MESS / OK, ENOUGH)
      <OkSlip/>                        [client]  #ok-initials/#ok-stamp/#ok-date/.ok-tab; #ok-reply1..3
      <JobLog/>                        [client]  #joblog > #jl-lines, #jl-rail/#jl-thumb, .jl-scroll
    <Yard/>                            [client]  .yard: <VisitorsCairn/> (#yard-svg, #pile, #yard-ground, #ground-line, #yard-count)
    <Outro/>                           [mostly server + client effects]  .outro, .outro-title(.regel), .outro-links, #write-link, .colophon, #colo-pulled, #knows-note, <VisitOdometer/> (#visit-n), <MakersMark/> (.pm-code/#pm-cells/#pm-ghost)
    <AmpFinale/>                       [client]  hooks onto #amp (see §4) — no own DOM beyond the reel it builds
```

**Server-renderable outright** (fully static/deterministic markup, hydrate cleanly): `Grain`, `Frame`, `Corners`, `MakersMark` (map static `P[]` 8×8 to two `<rect>` groups — the single easiest subsystem), the section *copy/headings*, the `Trail` static frame, the `Ticker` list content. Everything else is client because of refs/effects. Note that even client sections should render their **printed/settled DOM** on the server so no-JS and print ship correctly.

**id/class fidelity is load-bearing** — CSS selectors, the engine's `getElementById`-equivalent refs, the loader's cross-frame `parent.document` reads, and print/reduced media rules all key off exact strings. Every id/class above is copied verbatim from source; the JSX must not rename or restructure them.

---

## 3. Hooks

Grouped by owner. Every hook: registers `document`/`window` listeners *and* rAFs in one `useEffect` with a cleanup that cancels the rAF, disconnects observers, and clears timers (StrictMode mounts twice — a leaked loop = double gravity/double strike). Every localStorage/`matchMedia`/`getBoundingClientRect` read is inside an effect, never during render.

**Provider-level**
- `useMediaFlags()` → `{ isFine, isWide, isReduced, trailEnabled, hasCursor }` + ref getters. SSR default `false`; subscribe via `mql.addEventListener('change')`. Backs `mqFine/mqWide/mqReduce`.
- `useAccent()` → `{ accentI, setAccent, plates }`. `plates` is the `useMemo`. Persists `ma-accent-i` in an effect. Owns the `--accent` CSS-var effect (depends on `accentI` + `isNight`) and the `#hero-title.reprint` flash (imperative ref effect: remove class → `void node.getBoundingClientRect()` forced reflow → add class → `setTimeout(500)` remove; skip on mount and when `reduced||still`).
- `useTheme()` → `{ isNight, setNight }`. Persist-flag maps cleanly: button/key = `setNight(next,true)` (persist+log); auto-dim = `setNight(deskHour()>=23||<6, false)`. First-visit resolve in a mount effect (stored `ma-night` wins, else auto).
- `useScrollEngine()` → publishes `prog`; hosts the throttled scroll rAF; fans out to registered subscribers. Keep `scrollQueued` + `lastPct` string-dedupe.
- `useEngineFrame()` — the always-on cursor/reveal/loupe rAF. Reads `mouseRef`/`loupeOnRef`/`lineLoupeItem.face`. Preserve `LERP_PLATE=0.12`, velocity skew/rotate, `LOUPE_M=2.2`/`LOUPE_R=92` cover-fit math, all `last*` write-dedup caches.
- `useProofMode()` — owns the `[proofOn]` side-effect cascade (calls `strikeAll(true)`, `regHardZero()`, `resetLooseType()`, `positionAnchors()`, `watchNotes/unwatchNotes`, `updateThread(true)`, `cacheInkNotes()`, `catLife(on)`, `logAct()` via the registry). Plus `useNotesReveal` (the mess IO).
- `useAudio()` → `{ noiseOn, setNoise, sndClack, sndTok, sndSlam }`. `AudioContext` in a ref, lazy on enable, `resume()`. Synth graphs (osc/gain ramps/noise buffer/biquad) verbatim. Never persist.
- `useDeskClock()` → clock string + `isLateDesk`; `setInterval(30000)` with cleanup; render placeholder on server, fill on mount (`new Date()` is client-only).
- `useJobLog()` → `{ logEntries, logAct }`. `logAct` is a stable `useCallback` over a latest-entries ref (React equivalent of the hoisted decl). Teletype = effect keyed to newest entry id (30ms/space, 19ms/char) on a ref; print branch renders **uncapped**.
- `useBootAndKeys()` — one-time URL reads (`?still`→`stillMode`, `?proof`/`#proof`, `?fps`, hash `scrollIntoView`), the global `keydown` (M/P proof, N night, S noise, Esc close-project-else-proof; early-return on modifiers + INPUT targets except Esc), and the shared re-layout effect (ResizeObserver + `document.fonts.ready` → `buildLine/positionAnchors/buildTerrain/buildThread/measureStrikes/checkStrikes` via the registry).

**Hero**
- `useInkPooling(heroRef, charsRef, engine)` — `mousemove`→one-shot `inkFrame`; `heroGate` ref re-measured by `positionAnchors`; imperative `fontVariationSettings` writes; **amp-skip branch preserved**.
- `useLooseType(heroRef, charsRef, engine)` — per-`.ch` `pointerdown` + document `pointermove/pointerup/keydown`; self-perpetuating `physicsFrame`; `GRAV=2400`, bounce `0.42`, wall `0.5` verbatim; decal reset; GRAB ring. Class toggles (`type-loose/grabbed/returning/is-grab`) imperative. Feeds `mouseRef` (compat-mousemove).
- `usePlatePull(heroTitleRef, engine)` — shift-gated `pointerdown` (the *only* discriminator vs loose-type grab) + document `pointermove/pointerup`; inline `text-shadow` with `softPull`; `var(--pencil)`/`var(--accent)` kept as CSS-var refs so chips/night retint free; `plates-return` thunk + 600ms cleanup; `lastPullShadow` ref dedupes write *and* gates `logAct`.
- The glyph split is **declarative in JSX** (map each non-space char → `<span class="ch" ref>`), collected into `charsRef` shared by all three hooks. **Never replicate the destructive runtime `textContent`-empty-and-rebuild** (non-idempotent under re-render/StrictMode).

**Sections**
- `useLineLayout(indexRef, sheetRefs, itemsRef, {isMobile, accent, still})` — `useLayoutEffect` running `buildLine` geometry (`LINE_GEO_D/_M`, per-sheet left/top/width/z/rotate, dock/wll/cat, cached `face` rects). Deterministic variety math (`A/w1/p1/w2/p2` from `i*prime%n`) verbatim. Prefer emitting `spansPx` into a memo and rendering wire `<path>`s as JSX over `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`. `itemsRef` is a plain mutable array. Re-run on ResizeObserver + `fonts.ready`.
- `useLinePhysics(sheetRefs, itemsRef, {reduced, still, loupeItemRef, visibleRef})` — the line rAF; decay `0.955`, steady `0.045`, lift `0.09`, drag `0.055`, `-4.2/-4.4` overdamped spring, `0.03deg/0.002` write thresholds verbatim. Reads `.unstruck` + `lineLoupeItem` via refs.
- `useLineGlass(indexRef, itemsRef, engine)` — delegated pointer gesture model (hover→glass, press+move→swing, tap→open, hold-200ms→glass, hard-pull→wire hum + W.L.L. blip). `summonLoupe/dropLoupe` mutate the engine loupe refs. Vestigial `lineHoverLoupeT` dropped. `lineDragUsed`→`dragUsedRef` read by the viewer's row-click.
- `useLoupe()` (flat-list fallback) + the line path both port; parameterized by `lineOn`. `loupeOn` is a ref (read every frame). 230ms hold-to-summon.
- `useThoughtThread(refs)` — `buildThread` (`mulberry32(7)`) in `useLayoutEffect` + ResizeObserver + `fonts.ready`; `threadStep` reveal rAF subscribed to `prog`; lerp `0.16`, `TH_SPEED=3600`, 1.4px floor, `thSamples` binary search, `getPointAtLength` tip — verbatim.
- `useVisitCounter()` + odometer — `ma-visits` increment in a run-once-guarded effect; SSR placeholder `001`; em-stacked `translateY(-Nem)` roll after 1500ms + `body.odo-live`.
- `useCairn()` — `stackStones/groundStones/stoneSeq` as refs; imperative `#pile` draw; topple `e*e` rAF; persistence `cairn-stones-v2` (+ v1 migration, `ma-stone-seq`); `LEAN_LIMIT=30`/`STACK_CAP=9`/`GROUND_CAP=42`/`GROUND_Y=143` verbatim. `<StoneTip>` is a delegated `pointerover/out` effect on the same `pileRef`.
- `useTrailTerrain(terrainRef, groundRef)` — `buildTerrain` in `useLayoutEffect` + ResizeObserver + `fonts.ready`; measures landed stone bases; writes `<line class="tick">`/`<path class="ground">` imperatively; mobile `display:none` gate via `getComputedStyle` post-mount. Stone blobs are JSX `<path d={stonePath(30,24,22,9,201+i*17)}/>`.
- `useImpressionLine()` — `struckStore` as a ref (persist `ma-struck-v1`); `.unstruck` **added client-side after SSR ships printed** (zero mismatch); `IMP_LINE=0.62` synced with `.impline{top:62vh}`; `measureStrikes` cached, `checkStrikes` subscribed to `prog`; `beforeprint`→`strikeAll(true)`, `mqReduce change`→force-print; `ma-pulled-n` colophon.
- `useHoldRegister()` — builds `.regel` on hero title/outro title/`.spec-amp.s5`/row titles; `regFrame` subscribed to `prog`; quarter-px quantization verbatim; `regKick(px)` exposed via registry (called by loose-type land + `#plates-decal`); `regHeroBusy` reads `pullStateRef` + `plates-return`.
- `useTheSetting()` — seed-once (`srnd` ref, StrictMode-guarded); arms `set-in/set-fade/stones-armed`; one IO + `trailChoreo`/`yardChoreo` timeouts (ids in refs); exposes `disarmSetting` (registry); `kickSheet` mutates `lineItems[i].du` via the Line hook's imperative API; `mrRan` branch skips hero-set when the loader ran. Seeded jitter (`rj`, `--sy/--sx/--sr/--sd/--sdur`) verbatim. **Client-only** — SSR ships the visible fallback.
- `useOkSlip()` — `okState` lazy-hydrated from `ma-ok-v1` **in an effect** (not the `useState` initializer); `usePressHold` (620ms); `.thunk` restart via forced reflow; replies are derived text.
- `useCatLife(proofOn)`, `useFreshInk(proofOn)` — proof-gated; timers/`wetEl`/`wetLast` in refs; fresh-ink does **zero layout reads** in the throttled (90ms, 170px) `mousemove`; positions cached on mess-enter (add to the shared re-layout effect).
- `useTabTitleNudge()`, `useIdleWhisper({enabled:!stillMode})`, `usePageAwake({enabled, isMess, charsRef, regElRef, decodeRefs})` — small ambient hooks; `actMutter` mutates `.decode .c1` `textContent` imperatively (React must not own it); the `animationName` guard on the shared regmark `animationend` matters (event bubbles).
- `useMakeReadyLoader()` + `useAmpReel()` — see §4.

---

## 4. Loader strategy

The make-ready loader is the riskiest surface: a full-viewport **same-origin iframe** (`loader-lockup-mock.html?embed`) that reaches into `parent.document` to FLIP its lockup words into the live hero, posts `mr-lockup-done`, and hands its italic ampersand to the parent's `#amp` finale reel via two `window` globals.

**What must be preserved exactly (the contract):**
1. **Session gate**: first arrival only. `sessionStorage 'ma-press-check'` — the loader *reads* it, `pressCheck()` *writes* it. `?loader` forces replay (regex `/[?&]loader(\b|=)/` clears the flag). Return visits + reduced/still + SSR **skip the theater** and ship the settled page.
2. **Handoff timing**: `mr-lockup-done` → `setTimeout(release, 470)` → cross-fade → `setTimeout(remove + scheduleAmpFinale, 760)`; hard failsafes `9000` (stalled frame) and `3500` (`failsafeAmpReveal`). Any `keydown/pointerdown/wheel/touchstart` (capture+passive+once) skips.
3. **The `& ` finale** (`AmpFinale`): WAAPI-only (compositor), **no rAF, no React state** — a DOM-building transform machine. `window.__ampFly(glyphRect, MORPH_MS, srcColor)` (called synchronously by the loader at relax) and `window.__ampFlood()` (at flood) are the seam; `body.ceded` hides the loader's `.l-amp`. Physics verbatim: `P=A*1.32`, `WIN=P*1.15`, strip keyframe offsets, cubic-beziers, the 300ms 2px seat impression, `BANK` arrays ending on `&`. Feature-detect `Element.prototype.animate`, bail to `revealAmpStatic`. `SKIP_EVS` includes `scroll` (the fixed reel would shear). Watchdogs `TOTAL+500`/`1400`.
4. **Ordering with press-check**: the loader effect must observe `ma-press-check` *before* `pressCheck()` writes it (guaranteed today by top-to-bottom IIFE order) — keep them in one ordered mount sequence.

**Safest React expression — two options, ranked:**

- **Recommended: in-tree React overlay (kill the iframe).** Because hero and loader now live in one React tree, reimplement the loader as a client overlay component (`<MakeReadyLoader>`) that measures the *real* hero directly. This **eliminates the iframe + `postMessage` + `parent.*` + the two `window` globals**: the cross-boundary FLIP becomes a same-document `getBoundingClientRect` measurement, and `ampFly/ampFlood` become direct method calls (or an event-bus/`useImperativeHandle` shared with `AmpFinale`) instead of `window.__ampFly`. All timers/WAAPI cancelled in cleanup; `seatedRef`/`hasRunLoaderRef` guard StrictMode so it can't build two reels or load twice.
- **Fallback: keep the iframe as a route.** Serve `loader-lockup-mock.html` as a same-origin `/loader?embed` route. Then the `postMessage` bridge and `window.__ampFly/__ampFlood` globals must be preserved **verbatim** (do not "clean them up") — the child still does `parent.document` reads and `parent.__ampFly(...)`. Mount `<MakeReadyLoader>` once at root; gate the whole effect behind `hasRunLoaderRef` + the session check + `typeof window`. SSR renders nothing loader-related.

Either way: `mrRan`/`released`/`seated` are **refs, not state** (nothing re-renders on them); the settled page is the SSR/hydrate baseline; and the `#amp .ch` renders `opacity:1` server-side (`amp-armed` is client-only) so there is no hydration mismatch.

---

## 5. Fidelity risks & gotchas

**SSR / hydration**
- Every `localStorage`/`sessionStorage`/`Date`/Intl-hour/`matchMedia`/`getBoundingClientRect`/`document`/`location` read is **client-only** — resolve in `useEffect`, default deterministically (`accentI=0`, `isNight=false`, matches=`false`, count `001`, empty pile/log). Reading any of these during render diverges server↔client.
- The site's **"struck/settled is the default, JS arms the mess"** design is the hydration escape hatch: SSR ships printed (no `.unstruck`, no `set-*`, amp visible). Client effects *add* `.unstruck`/arming after mount → no mismatch, and no-JS/print get the right sheet for free.
- The SETTING is `Date.now()`-seeded — if it ran during render, SSR would emit different `--sy/--sd` vars *and* a metronome-uniform reveal (the exact anti-pattern the design killed). It must be effect-only.
- A tiny blocking inline theme script in `<head>` can pre-set `data-theme`/`body.night` to avoid a night-mode flash before hydration.

**StrictMode double-mount** (dev)
- Run-once guards (`useRef(false)`) on the two counters (`ma-visits`, `ma-stone-seq`), the loader (`hasRunLoaderRef`), the amp reel (`seatedRef`), press-check, `initStrikes`, `initSetting` (reuse the seed, don't reseed).
- Cancel **every** rAF (`cancelAnimationFrame`), disconnect **every** observer, `clearTimeout/clearInterval` **every** timer, and remove **every** listener in cleanup. A leaked cursor/line/physics loop = two loops fighting the same `transform`; a leaked interval = dangling clock; a double `appendChild` = duplicated ticker/reel.
- Ticker and plate builds must be **declarative/idempotent** (double-render the 2nd copy `aria-hidden`) — never port the imperative `appendChild`+`innerHTML` clone.

**Preserving ids/classes & imperative DOM**
- Every id/class in §2 is a hard CSS/selector/cross-frame contract — do not rename or restructure. Data-URIs are assigned as **style values** (`style={{backgroundImage: plates[i]}}`), never interpolated into a CSS string (the quote-break gotcha).
- Keep the intentionally-imperative SVG (`#pile`, `#terrain-ground`, the amp reel) **out of React reconciliation** — a key-diff over dozens of seeded groups is slower and breaks the transform-write topple/flight physics.
- Forced-reflow tricks (`void el.getBoundingClientRect()` to restart a keyframe: reprint flash, regmark fidget, ok-stamp thunk) are load-bearing — keep them; a React key-bump is a weaker substitute.
- The **compat-mousemove** rule (drag hooks feed `mouseRef` from their own `pointermove`) recurs at loupe, loose-type, plate-pull — port verbatim or the cursor freezes mid-drag.
- The shared `.regmark` has three imperative writers (fidget CSS, `regTick` `style.rotate`, hold-register `style.translate`) — they compose on one element and must not fight; give it one `<RegMark>` ref.

**Physics/seed math** — do not "improve" any of it: `mulberry32`/`stonePath` wobble, line lerps + overdamped spring, thread lerp/`TH_SPEED`/samples, `GRAV=2400`/bounce/wall, `softPull` pow-0.72×2.2, topple `e*e`, hold-register quarter-px quantization, WAAPI reel offsets, synth graphs, the SETTING jitter. Seeded determinism is what keeps geometry hydration-stable.

**Fonts** — variable-font `fontVariationSettings` (ink pooling, `opsz 144`) and every layout measurement depend on fonts being loaded: gate `buildLine/buildTerrain/buildThread/positionAnchors/measureStrikes` behind `document.fonts.ready` (guard `document.fonts &&`) *and* a ResizeObserver. `releaseMasks`→`.landed` gates `.ch` pointer events + `.hl-mask` overflow — the amp finale requires `.landed` before it builds the reel.

**Query params** — `?still` (freeze → visible fallback), `?loader` (replay), `?fps` (dev meter), `?proof`/`#proof` (open mess), `#anchor` deep-links, `#p-0N` (project modal), `?embed` (loader child). All read client-side in the boot effect.

**The `rows` NodeList has no React analog** — downstream iterators (choreography, buildLine, strikes, hold-register, viewer `buildPV`) map over project data or collect refs instead of iterating a live `querySelectorAll('.row')`.

---

## 6. Build order

Each phase is independently committable and headless-verifiable (Playwright: assert DOM structure, computed styles, class toggles, and — where motion matters — deterministic seeded geometry snapshots and `reduced-motion`/`?still` end-states, never "feel").

**Phase 0 — Scaffold.** Next App Router project, root layout, `app/page.tsx` shipping the **static settled DOM** for every section (verbatim ids/classes, copy, `MakersMark`, `Grain/Frame/Corners`, the Ticker list). No JS behavior. *Verify:* headless snapshot matches the vanilla page's printed/`?still` DOM; print + no-JS render correctly; zero hydration warnings.

**Phase 1 — Pure utils.** `lib/rng`, `lib/math`, `lib/plates`, `lib/desk`, `lib/paths`. *Verify:* unit-test that `stonePath`/`plateURI`/`detailURI`/`deskTime`/`softPull` produce byte-identical output to the vanilla functions for fixed seeds/inputs.

**Phase 2 — EngineProvider foundation.** Context + media flags + accent/plates memo + night/theme + `--accent` effect + `PaintChips`/`NightToggle` + desk clock + boot reads (URL/hash/keydown) + `useJobLog`/`JobLog` + audio/`NoiseToggle`. No motion loops yet. *Verify:* chip click re-inks all thumbnails (memo, not imperative); night toggle flips `--accent`/`body.night`; keyboard M/N/S/Esc dispatch; clock ticks; `ma-*` persistence; SSR defaults.

**Phase 3 — Shared frame loops.** `useScrollEngine` (publishes `prog`, `#scroll-pct`, `CairnIndicator`), `useEngineFrame` (`Cursor`/`Reveal`/`Loupe` singletons), `hasCursor`. *Verify:* scroll `prog` fans out; cursor tracks pointer 1:1; reveal lerp under `hasCursor`; one rAF each (no leaks) across mount/unmount.

**Phase 4 — Sections in dependency order (each behind the engine):**
1. **Hero** — glyph split JSX + `useInkPooling`/`useLooseType`/`usePlatePull`; `releaseMasks`→`.landed`. *(depends on: engine frame, `mouseRef`, fonts.)*
2. **ThoughtThread** — geometry + reveal, subscribed to `prog` (proof-gated). *(mess visibility only.)*
3. **Trail** — `useTrailTerrain` (measured ground). *(depends on: fonts, ResizeObserver.)*
4. **WorkIndex** — `useLineLayout` → `useLinePhysics` → `useLineGlass`/`useLoupe`; `WorkRow` thumbnails + choreography fallback. *(depends on: engine loupe refs, plates, `lineOn`.)*
5. **ImpressionLine + HoldRegister + RegMark** — strikes + reg, subscribed to `prog`; `regKick` in registry. *(the "strike = ink" law; SSR-printed → arm `.unstruck` client-side.)*
6. **Yard** — `useCairn` + `StoneTip`. **Desk** — `OkSlip`, wire `JobLog` fully. **Outro** — `VisitOdometer`, `knows-note`, `colophon`.
7. **Ambient** — `useCatLife`, `useFreshInk`, `useTabTitleNudge`, `useIdleWhisper`, `usePageAwake`, `FpsMeter`.

*Verify each:* seeded geometry snapshot stable across reload; physics end-states match under `?still`/`reduced`; persistence round-trips; every rAF/observer/timer cleans up.

**Phase 5 — Proof mode.** `useProofMode` cascade + `ProofToggleButton` + `#pv-mess` mirror + notes IO + mess anchors (`useAnchoredMarks`, `positionAnchors`). *(wires the "SEE THE MESS" master flag through all sections built above.)* *Verify:* M/P toggles `body.proof`; strike-all, reg-zero, loose-type reset, thread retrace, cat/fresh-ink arm; anchors position after fonts.

**Phase 6 — The SETTING.** `useTheSetting` (seed-once, one IO, two choreo timeouts, `disarmSetting` in registry, `mrRan` branch). *(the "setting = matter" law; must land after all section DOM exists so it can arm real nodes.)* *Verify:* seeded-asymmetric reveal (no metronome), `disarmSetting` on proof-enter/reduced, `beforeprint` set-go, hydration-stable `--sd` vars only appear client-side.

**Phase 7 — ProjectViewer.** `#pv` portal, `caseData`, hash routing `#p-0N` (`useHashRoute`), Esc precedence (pv-close before mess-exit), NEXT PROOF, mess annotation. *(depends on: accent plates, `dragUsedRef` from the line.)* *Verify:* deep-link/back-button/Esc flow; `pv-plate`/`pv-duo` re-ink on accent change automatically (no `rebuildPlates`).

**Phase 8 — Loader last.** `MakeReadyLoader` + `AmpFinale` (§4, recommended in-tree overlay). *(the entrance fiction that hands into press-check — built last so the whole settled page exists behind it.)* *Verify:* first-visit-only via session gate; `?loader` replay; skip on input/reduced/still; amp seat lands at the native glyph; failsafes fire; StrictMode builds exactly one reel; return visit skips entirely.

Phases 0-3 stand alone as a working, inkable, navigable (motionless) site; 4-8 layer motion in dependency order so each commit is a strictly-additive, headless-verifiable increment.
